pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source property to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 language features, preventing the use of Java 21 syntax and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler target property to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the generated bytecode is compatible with Java 17, which may fail to run on environments strictly enforcing Java 21 class file versions or missing Java 17 runtime support.
